title: Oatzimami Fluffy Dish
description: A light German dish featuring oat milk and air-fried elements for a low-carb, umami-flavored breakfast option.

ingredients.name: Herbs and Spices (optional)
ingredients.notes: For flavoring, such as salt, pepper, and garlic powder.

instructions: Whisk the egg whites until stiff peaks form.
In a separate bowl, mix oat milk with baking powder, vegetable oil, and herbs/spices. If using, add in some of these to taste.
Fold the mixture gently into the beaten egg whites to incorporate.
Place folded mixture onto a parchment-lined tray for even cooking.
Cook at 180°C (350°F) for about 20 minutes or until golden brown.
